text.message: I've been plowed brutally each of my last two games. I must be subconsciously addicted to it lol
i mean the 695 is a pretty sweet starting spot tho haha
i'm just surprised you didn't want wood port with potential to get 6-9-4
ahh the sbs nice find blue
i think im taking the road lol
i have no guaranteed expansion spots
middle of board is kind of open
black thought you would do 4-5-11 to 9-10-11
no road mats to get there
i think i have to do 8-4 or 4-11
What you want to not take 8 4?
yeah its gg if you give them the world
actually would you do it for a wheat instead?
I can do it in a bit
Just don’t let him get army
Also it’s sheep port. If he had ore port with 8 4. That’s worse
I can do that trade red
i think we can pump the brakes on game being over for me
game coulda been so simple lol
Green not taking wheat port was interesting
may have been a big mistake lol
thought setting up extra settles would be better
what a useless block against green
Winning regardless tbh. That 6 9 5 spot almost unstoppable
this started with you giving them sheep port
then yo u guys trading and not blocking
He would’ve gotten army plus more anyway
lol youre making it sound like it was inevitable
I could’ve taken army if I didn’t get 3 VPs lol
so blue a road from win?
and yet its still me ? lol
i will give a brick for free
